description: Accumulate a4/ .md edits during a session (PostToolUse), validate them at Stop, and sweep records at SessionStart/SessionEnd. Session-scoped record at .claude/tmp/a4-edited/a4-edited-<session_id>.txt avoids re-reporting pre-existing violations in files the user did not touch.

hooks.description: Record edited a4/*.md files to a session-scoped list
Validate all a4/ files edited this session; exit 2 on violations to force fix
Delete this session's a4-edited record file
Sweep orphan a4-edited record files older than 1 day
